sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ الْعَائِلَةُ دَوْرًا مَرْكَزِيًّا فِي حَيَاةِ الْفَرْدِ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Porodica igra centralnu ulogu u životu pojedinca u arapskom društvu.
sentences.translationEn: The family plays a central role in the life of the individual in Arab society.

sentences.arabic: يَعِيشُ بَعْضُ الْأَبْنَاءِ مَعَ وَالِدِيهِمْ حَتَّى بَعْدَ الزَّوَاجِ أَحْيَانًا.
sentences.translation: Neka djeca žive sa svojim roditeljima čak i nakon braka.
sentences.translationEn: Some children live with their parents even after marriage sometimes.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَرِمُ الصِّغَارُ كِبَارَ السِّنِّ وَيَسْتَمِعُونَ إِلَى نَصَائِحِهِمْ بِاهْتِمَامٍ.
sentences.translation: Mlađi poštuju starije i sa zanimanjem slušaju njihove savjete.
sentences.translationEn: The young respect the elderly and listen to their advice with interest.

sentences.arabic: تَقْوَى الرَّوَابِطُ الْأُسَرِيَّةُ مِنْ خِلَالِ الِاجْتِمَاعَاتِ الْأُسْبُوعِيَّةِ الْمُسْتَمِرَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodične veze jačaju kroz stalna sedmična okupljanja.
sentences.translationEn: Family bonds strengthen through continuous weekly gatherings.
